content:
🚨We finally have a ‘Figma for AI agents’.
Meet Awesome-design-md.
It's an amazing curated collection of UI systems extracted from 50+ top websites, formatted for coding agents.
Instead of parsing screenshots or messy design files, just drop a DESIGN.md into your project.
It upgrades your AI’s UI skills instantly:
→ Unlocks 50+ elite design systems: Cursor, Vercel, Stripe, Spotify, SpaceX, and more
→ Structured into 9 clear sections: typography, spacing, elevation, rules
→ Includes light/dark previews for quick visual checks
→ Uses Google Stitch’s native plain-text format for LLMs
Best part?
You don't have to guess the prompting.
Every file includes an Agent Guide with ready-to-use prompts.
AGENTS.md controls the logic. DESIGN.md controls the UI 👊
100% Free and open-source.
